channel.title: Polygon Digital
channel.description: Market analysis with conviction. We tell you what we think is happening and why it matters.

item.title: Welcome to Polygon Digital
item.description: What this platform is, what gets published here, and why it exists.

item.title: Reading the curve: a primer on term structure
item.description: Contango, backwardation, and what the shape of a futures curve is actually telling you.
